steps.title: Identify the time shift clue
steps.content: The passage contrasts the 1940 isolation with the later realization that androstenone appears in plants, highlighted by “but this discovery didn’t occur until decades later.”

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content:
Today,” directly marks the move from the past experiment to current understanding, showing that scientists now know about the plant source.
The other choices either give an example, restate the idea, or imply a cause‑effect, none of which matches the time shift.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
